EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IJSONObject

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides simplified DOM-like JSON serialization and de-serialization API.

[Guid("EEA70515-FA6B-4DEE-AB79-D7935BF3A838")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IJSONObject

Properties

CaseSensitiveNames

Returns true if member name lookups are case-sensitive. Default value is true. Methods affected by this state change: MemberExists, IsValueNull and all TryGet... methods.

bool CaseSensitiveNames { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

MemberCount

Returns size of member collection.

int MemberCount { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Methods

Add(string, object)

Adds new member name-value pair to the member collection. Returns E_FAIL if duplicate member is found.

void Add(string Name, object Value)

Parameters

Name string
Value object

Examples

Sample Snippet

AddBoolean(string, bool)

Adds new member name-value pair to the member collection. Returns E_FAIL if duplicate member is found.

void AddBoolean(string Name, bool Value)

Parameters

Name string
Value bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

AddDate(string, DateTime)

Adds new member name-value pair to the member collection. Returns E_FAIL if duplicate member is found.

void AddDate(string Name, DateTime Value)

Parameters

Name string
Value DateTime

Examples

Sample Snippet

AddDouble(string, double)

Adds new member name-value pair to the member collection. Returns E_FAIL if duplicate member is found.

void AddDouble(string Name, double Value)

Parameters

Name string
Value double

Examples

Sample Snippet

AddDoubleEx(string, double, int)

Adds new member name-value pair to the member collection. Stores precision for use in ToJSON and ToJSONString. Returns E_FAIL if duplicate member is found.

void AddDoubleEx(string Name, double Value, int precision)

Parameters

Name string
Value double
precision int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Parameters

Name string
Value IJSONArray

Parameters

Name string
Value IJSONObject

Adds new member name-value pair to the member collection. Returns E_FAIL if duplicate member is found.

void AddLong(string Name, int Value)

Parameters

Name string
Value int

Examples

Sample Snippet

AddNull(string)

Adds new member with the value of null to the member collection. Returns E_FAIL if duplicate member is found.

void AddNull(string Name)

Parameters

Name string

Examples

Sample Snippet

AddString(string, string)

Adds new member name-value pair to the member collection. Returns E_FAIL if duplicate member is found.

void AddString(string Name, string Value)

Parameters

Name string
Value string

Examples

Sample Snippet

ClearAll()

Removes all members.

void ClearAll()

Examples

Sample Snippet

CreateMemberArray(string, out IJSONArray)

Creates and adds new member name-value pair to the member collection. Returns E_FAIL if duplicate member is found.

void CreateMemberArray(string Name, out IJSONArray Value)

Parameters

Name string
Value IJSONArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

CreateMemberObject(string, out IJSONObject)

Creates and adds new member name-value pair to the member collection. Returns E_FAIL if duplicate member is found.

void CreateMemberObject(string Name, out IJSONObject Value)

Parameters

Name string
Value IJSONObject

Examples

Sample Snippet

GetMemberAt(int, out string, out object)

Returns member name and value at a given index.

void GetMemberAt(int Index, out string Name, out object Value)

Parameters

Index int
Name string
Value object

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsValueNull(string)

Returns VARIANT_TRUE if member is undefined or member's value is null. Returns VARIANT_FALSE if member exists and its value is not null.

bool IsValueNull(string Name)

Parameters

Name string

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

MakeValueNull(string)

Make a designated member NULL.

void MakeValueNull(string Name)

Parameters

Name string

Examples

Sample Snippet

MemberExists(string)

Checks if a member with the given name exists.

bool MemberExists(string Name)

Parameters

Name string

Returns

bool

Parameters

pReader IJSONReader

Parses JSON object from string into memory.

void ParseString(string json)

Parameters

json string

RemoveMember(string)

Remove a member from the member collection.

void RemoveMember(string Name)

Name string

Sample Snippet

ToJSON(string, IJSONWriter)

Parameters

objectName string
pWriter IJSONWriter

ToJSONString(IPropertySet) 

string ToJSONString(IPropertySet props)

Parameters

props IPropertySet

Returns

string

TryGetValue(string, out object)

Returns member value for a given name. If member does not exist, returns VARIANT_FALSE in 'success' parameter.

bool TryGetValue(string Name, out object Value)

Parameters

Name string
Value object

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

TryGetValueAsArray(string, out IJSONArray)

Returns member value for a given name as IJSONArray. If member does not exist or type coercion fails, returns VARIANT_FALSE in 'success' parameter.

bool TryGetValueAsArray(string Name, out IJSONArray Value)

Parameters

Name string
Value IJSONArray

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

TryGetValueAsBoolean(string, out bool)

Returns member value for a given name as boolean. If member does not exist or type coercion fails, returns VARIANT_FALSE in 'success' parameter.

bool TryGetValueAsBoolean(string Name, out bool Value)

Parameters

Name string
Value bool

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

TryGetValueAsDate(string, out DateTime)

Returns member value for a given name as DATE. If member does not exist or type coercion fails, returns VARIANT_FALSE in 'success' parameter.

bool TryGetValueAsDate(string Name, out DateTime Value)

Parameters

Name string
Value DateTime

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

TryGetValueAsDouble(string, out double)

Returns member value for a given name as double. If member does not exist or type coercion fails, returns VARIANT_FALSE in 'success' parameter.

bool TryGetValueAsDouble(string Name, out double Value)

Parameters

Name string
Value double

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

TryGetValueAsLong(string, out int)

Returns member value for a given name as long. If member does not exist or type coercion fails, returns VARIANT_FALSE in 'success' parameter.

bool TryGetValueAsLong(string Name, out int Value)

Parameters

Name string
Value int

Returns

bool

Sample Snippet

TryGetValueAsObject(string, out IJSONObject)
